revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿七]][[zh:二月廿七]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 27|qq=February 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 27''' is the 27th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|673|en|673|qid=Q31105|lt=673|1=673}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – Ōaijin Prince (大海人皇子) ascended, becoming the 40th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}}, known as {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}}. * {{ill|Kannō|en|Kannō|qid=Q1145053|lt=Kannō|1=Kannō}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1350|en|1350|qid=Q6094|lt=1350|1=1350}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|qid=Q2508|lt=April 4|1=April 4}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1146143|lt=Seiwa|1=Jōwa (Muromachi period)}} to {{ill|Kannō|en|Kannō|qid=Q1145053|lt=Kan'ō|1=Kannō}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11131293}} 1st year/{{ill|Tianshou|en|Tianshou|qid=Q10939676|lt=Tenshō (Japan)|1=Tianshou}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1375|en|1375|qid=Q6277|lt=1375|1=1375}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} to {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11131293}}. * {{ill|Eitoku|en|Eitoku|qid=Q1145805|lt=Chitoku|1=Eitoku}} 1st year/{{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1384|en|1384|qid=Q6347|lt=1384|1=1384}} {{ill|March 19|en|March 19|qid=Q2424|lt=March 19|1=March 19}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Eitoku|en|Eitoku|qid=Q1145805|lt=Eitoku|1=Eitoku}} to {{ill|Chitoku|ja|至徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chitoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=至德|qid=Q1207030}}. * {{ill|Bunroku|en|Bunroku|qid=Q1373039|lt=Bunroku|1=Bunroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1594|en|1594|qid=Q6777|lt=1594|1=1594}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|qid=Q2520|lt=April 17|1=April 17}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} hosted a flower-viewing party at Yoshino. * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsukuni|ja|徳川光国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Mitsukuni|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川光圀|1=Tokugawa Mitsukuni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1194944}} began the compilation of the {{ill|Dai Nihonshi|en|Dai Nihonshi|qid=Q1156003|lt=Dai Nihonshi|1=Dai Nihonshi}} (completed 250 years later in 1906). * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|qid=Q1145798|lt=Kanpō|1=Kanpō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1741|en|1741|qid=Q7573|lt=1741|1=1741}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – In commemoration of the 【Yin Metal Rooster】 (辛酉), the era name was changed from {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} to {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|qid=Q1145798|lt=Kanpō|1=Kanpō}}. == Births == * {{ill|Kangi|en|Kangi|qid=Q1194200|lt=Kanki|1=Kangi}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1229|en|1229|qid=Q5411|lt=1229|1=1229}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Nagatoki|en|Hōjō Nagatoki|qid=Q2906574|lt=Hōjō Nagatoki|1=Hōjō Nagatoki}}, the 6th {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (died {{ill|1264|en|1264|qid=Q5514|lt=1264|1=1264}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 32nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1425|en|1425|qid=Q6283|lt=1425|1=1425}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshikazu|en|Ashikaga Yoshikazu|qid=Q465901|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshikazu}}, the 5th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (born {{ill|1407|en|1407|qid=Q6134|lt=1407|1=1407}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|26|2|28|1|27|3|2|0227|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 27일]] [[ja:2月27日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月廿七]]
[[ar:February 27 (Lunisolar)]]
